creator: valeri_ufo@web.de
text:
Hello, I've changed the COMMENT and the pkg-descr file a bit, in my opinion
it is described a bit better now.

I've tested the port again: it builds, it cleans-up, it makes packages etc.
and portlint reports that everything is just fine.

Here are the links to the PyBookReader port

http://ufo.opensrc.ru/pybookreader/ or http://ufo.opensrc.ru/pybookreader.tar

So if you are ok with the changes, commit it.
Yours faithfully, Val.
